{
  "judge_id": "your_judge_id",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 3,
    "R1.4": 3,
    "R1.7": 2,
    "RX.1": 1,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The text mentions related work but doesn't explicitly compare CalDML's performance against existing methods in terms of evidence-claim alignment.",
    "R1.4": "The text names some prior works but lacks a detailed comparison of CalDML's novelty and how it differs from them.",
    "R1.7": "While the text mentions some relevant citations, it misses several key works in the field of causal inference and machine learning.",
    "RX.1": "The text does not discuss uncertainty quantification or confidence intervals for the proposed method.",
    "RX.3": "The text focuses on a specific set of benchmarks and doesn't explicitly address whether CalDML can handle other types of data or tasks.",
    "RX.4": "No mention of potential harm or biases introduced by the proposed method.",
    "RX.5": "The text does not discuss the provenance or traceability of the proposed method."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.7,
    "R1.4": 0.6,
    "R1.7": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.7,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.8
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The text mentions related work but doesn't explicitly compare CalDML's performance against existing methods in terms of evidence-claim alignment.
rationale.R1.4: The text names some prior works but lacks a detailed comparison of CalDML's novelty and how it differs from them.
rationale.R1.7: While the text mentions some relevant citations, it misses several key works in the field of causal inference and machine learning.
rationale.RX.1: The text does not discuss uncertainty quantification or confidence intervals for the proposed method.
rationale.RX.3: The text focuses on a specific set of benchmarks and doesn't explicitly address whether CalDML can handle other types of data or tasks.
rationale.RX.4: No mention of potential harm or biases introduced by the proposed method.
rationale.RX.5: The text does not discuss the provenance or traceability of the proposed method.
